---
title: "数据清洗与探索性分析"
---

## 加载 R 包

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```

## 读取原始数据

```{r}
#| label: load-data
allmetals <- read.csv('Data/Langmuir and Hill isotherms fitting/allmetals2_isotherm.csv')
cat("原始数据维度:", dim(allmetals), "\n")
kable(head(allmetals), caption = "原始数据前6行")
```

## 数据清洗

```{r}
#| label: clean-data
# 剔除无效生物炭（SWP550, SWP550AW）
selmetals <- allmetals[!allmetals$Biochar %in% c("SWP550","SWP550AW"), ]
cat("剔除SWP550系列后维度:", dim(selmetals), "\n")

# 剔除高浓度异常点（Ce > 50 mg/L）
selmetals <- selmetals[selmetals$Ce_mg_l < 50, ]
cat("剔除Ce>50后维度:", dim(selmetals), "\n")

# 将Biochar和Metal列转为因子（去除多余水平）
selmetals <- droplevels(selmetals)
```

## 描述性统计

```{r}
#| label: desc-stats
desc_stats <- selmetals %>%
  group_by(Biochar, Metal) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),
            Ce_mean = mean(Ce_mg_l),
            Ce_sd = sd(Ce_mg_l),
            Qe_mean = mean(Qe_mg_g),
            Qe_sd = sd(Qe_mg_g),
            .groups = "drop")

kable(desc_stats, caption = "各生物炭-金属组合的描述性统计")
```

## 数据可视化

```{r}
#| label: fig-initial-scatter
#| fig-cap: "初始吸附等温线数据"
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
ggplot(data=allmetals, aes(x=Ce_mg_l, y=Qe_mg_g, group=interaction(Biochar,Metal))) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_grid(Metal ~ Biochar, scales="free") +
  labs(title = "原始数据")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-cleaned-scatter
#| fig-cap: "清洗后的吸附等温线数据"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 6
ggplot(selmetals, aes(x=Ce_mg_l, y=Qe_mg_g, color=Metal)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ Biochar, scales="free") +
  labs(title = "Cleaned isotherm data")
```

## 保存中间结果

```{r}
#| label: save-data
# 保存清洗后的数据供后续章节使用
saveRDS(selmetals, "output/selmetals.rds")
cat("数据已保存到 output/selmetals.rds\n")
```
